description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Coverity Scan that runs daily at 11:00 UTC and can be triggered manually. The workflow should have read-only permissions to all repository contents. In an ubuntu-latest job, set up the environment with clang and clang++ compilers, install system dependencies, configure and run Coverity Scan on libgeopmd and libgeopm directories using the vapier/coverity-scan-action with tokens and emails from secrets.
